Package com.marklogic.flux.api

Interface StructuredDataImporter.GroupByOptions<T extends StructuredDataImporter.GroupByOptions<T>>

Enclosing interface:
StructuredDataImporter<T extends StructuredDataImporter<T>>
public static interface StructuredDataImporter.GroupByOptions<T extends StructuredDataImporter.GroupByOptions<T>>
Options for configuring aggregation behavior when grouping rows.
Since:
2.1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    aggregateColumns(String aggregationName, String... columns)
    Define an aggregation of multiple columns into a new column.
    T
    orderAggregation(String aggregationName, String columnName, boolean ascending)
    Specify ordering for an aggregation produced by aggregateColumns(String, String...).

  • Method Details

    • aggregateColumns

      T aggregateColumns(String aggregationName, String... columns)
      Define an aggregation of multiple columns into a new column. Each aggregation creates a new column containing an array of values from the specified columns.
      Parameters:
      aggregationName - the name of the new column to create
      columns - the names of the columns to aggregate into an array
      Returns:
      this options instance
      Since:
      2.1.0

    • orderAggregation

      T orderAggregation(String aggregationName, String columnName, boolean ascending)
      Specify ordering for an aggregation produced by aggregateColumns(String, String...). The column name must be one of the columns in the corresponding aggregation.
      Parameters:
      aggregationName - the name of the aggregation to order
      columnName - the name of the column to order by
      ascending - true for ascending order, false for descending
      Returns:
      this options instance
      Since:
      2.1.0
